title: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
summary_full: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.
summary_public: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.

RU.label: negative
